sentences.en: The propensity model identifies users most likely to upgrade to a paid plan.
sentences.zh: 倾向性模型识别最有可能升级为付费计划的用户。

sentences.en: We launched a win-back campaign targeting users who canceled in the last 90 days.
sentences.zh: 我们针对过去90天内取消订阅的用户发起了召回活动。

sentences.en: The channel mix needs to shift towards owned media to reduce dependency on paid ads.
sentences.zh: 渠道组合需要向自有媒体倾斜，以减少对付费广告的依赖。

sentences.en: Micro-influencers delivered a 3x higher engagement rate than celebrity endorsements.
sentences.zh: 微型KOL带来的互动率是明星代言的3倍。

sentences.en: The onboarding checklist completion rate correlates strongly with 30-day retention.
sentences.zh: 新手引导清单的完成率与30日留存率强相关。

example.en: The propensity score helps us prioritize outreach to high-intent users.
example.zh: 倾向性分数帮助我们优先触达高意向用户。

example.en: The win-back email offered a 50% discount to returning subscribers.
example.zh: 召回邮件为回归订阅用户提供了50%的折扣。

example.en: Optimizing the channel mix maximizes ROI across marketing spend.
example.zh: 优化渠道组合能最大化营销支出的ROI。

example.en: Micro-influencers have smaller audiences but higher trust and engagement.
example.zh: 微型KOL受众更小，但信任度和互动率更高。

example.en: Feature usage frequency correlates with long-term user retention.
example.zh: 功能使用频率与长期用户留存相关联。

sentences.en: The load balancer distributed traffic unevenly, causing one server to reach capacity.
sentences.zh: 负载均衡器分配流量不均，导致一台服务器达到容量上限。

sentences.en: We need to implement graceful degradation so the app remains usable during outages.
sentences.zh: 我们需要实现优雅降级，使App在故障期间仍然可用。

sentences.en: The design system reduced component development time by 40% across all teams.
sentences.zh: 设计系统使所有团队的组件开发时间减少了40%。

sentences.en: The migration to microservices improved deployment independence but increased operational complexity.
sentences.zh: 向微服务的迁移提升了部署独立性，但增加了运维复杂度。

sentences.en: The telemetry data shows a spike in error rates between 2 AM and 4 AM UTC.
sentences.zh: 遥测数据显示UTC凌晨2点到4点之间错误率出现尖峰。

example.en: The load balancer routes incoming requests to the least busy server.
example.zh: 负载均衡器将传入请求路由到最空闲的服务器。

example.en: Graceful degradation ensures core features work even when some services are down.
example.zh: 优雅降级确保即使部分服务宕机，核心功能仍然可用。

example.en: A well-maintained design system ensures visual consistency across the product.
example.zh: 维护良好的设计系统确保产品的视觉一致性。

example.en: Microservices allow each team to deploy independently without affecting others.
example.zh: 微服务允许每个团队独立部署而不影响其他团队。

example.en: Application telemetry provides real-time visibility into system health.
example.zh: 应用遥测提供对系统健康状态的实时可见性。

sentences.en: The Sharpe ratio of our portfolio is 1.2, which outperforms the benchmark.
sentences.zh: 我们投资组合的夏普比率为1.2，跑赢了基准。

sentences.en: The company announced a secondary offering to raise capital for expansion.
sentences.zh: 公司宣布二次发行以筹集扩张资金。

sentences.en: Retail investor participation in the Hong Kong market increased 25% year-over-year.
sentences.zh: 散户投资者在港股市场的参与度同比增长了25%。

sentences.en: The cost of capital is rising, which makes unprofitable growth less attractive.
sentences.zh: 资本成本正在上升，这使得无利润增长变得不那么有吸引力。

sentences.en: The quarterly filing disclosed a material weakness in internal controls.
sentences.zh: 季度申报披露了内部控制中的重大缺陷。

example.en: A Sharpe ratio above 1.0 is generally considered a good risk-adjusted return.
example.zh: 夏普比率超过1.0通常被视为良好的风险调整后回报。

example.en: The secondary offering diluted existing shareholders by 8%.
example.zh: 二次发行使现有股东被稀释了8%。

example.en: Retail investors now account for 30% of daily trading volume.
example.zh: 散户投资者目前占每日交易量的30%。

example.en: Projects should only proceed if their expected return exceeds the cost of capital.
example.zh: 只有预期回报超过资本成本时，项目才应推进。

example.en: A material weakness in controls can trigger regulatory scrutiny.
example.zh: 内控中的重大缺陷可能引发监管审查。

sentences.en: The headcount plan for Q3 includes two senior engineers and one data analyst.
sentences.zh: Q3的编制计划包括两名高级工程师和一名数据分析师。

sentences.en: We implemented asynchronous communication guidelines to support our distributed team.
sentences.zh: 我们制定了异步沟通指南以支持分布式团队。

sentences.en: The talent review identified three high-potential employees for the fast-track program.
sentences.zh: 人才盘点识别出三名高潜力员工进入快速通道项目。

sentences.en: The exit interview data suggests compensation is the primary reason people leave.
sentences.zh: 离职面谈数据表明薪酬是员工离职的首要原因。

sentences.en: We are piloting a four-day workweek to measure its impact on productivity and wellbeing.
sentences.zh: 我们正在试行四天工作制，以衡量其对生产力和健康的影响。

example.en: The headcount freeze means no new hires until Q4.
example.zh: 编制冻结意味着Q4之前不会有新招聘。

example.en: Asynchronous communication works better for teams across multiple time zones.
example.zh: 异步沟通更适合跨多个时区的团队。

example.en: High-potential employees receive additional training and mentoring opportunities.
example.zh: 高潜力员工获得额外的培训和辅导机会。

example.en: Exit interview insights help reduce future attrition.
example.zh: 离职面谈的洞察有助于降低未来的离职率。

example.en: We will pilot the new process with one team before rolling it out company-wide.
example.zh: 我们将先在一个团队试行新流程，再推广到全公司。

sentences.en: The PESTEL analysis highlighted geopolitical risk as the top external threat.
sentences.zh: PESTEL分析将地缘政治风险标记为最大的外部威胁。

sentences.en: We should pursue a razor-and-blade model where the core product is free but add-ons are paid.
sentences.zh: 我们应该采用剃刀-刀片模式，核心产品免费但增值服务收费。

sentences.en: The three-horizon framework separates immediate optimization from long-term bets.
sentences.zh: 三层面框架将短期优化和长期押注区分开来。

sentences.en: Our data moat grows stronger with every trade executed on the platform.
sentences.zh: 平台上每执行一笔交易，我们的数据护城河就变得更强。

sentences.en: The total cost of ownership should include implementation, training, and ongoing maintenance.
sentences.zh: 总拥有成本应包括实施、培训和持续维护。

vocabulary.meaning: PESTEL分析（政治经济社会技术环境法律）

example.en: PESTEL analysis provides a macro-level view of the external environment.
example.zh: PESTEL分析提供外部环境的宏观视角。

example.en: The razor-and-blade model locks in customers through consumable purchases.
example.zh: 剃刀-刀片模式通过消耗品购买锁定客户。

example.en: Horizon one focuses on the core business, while horizon three explores disruptive innovation.
example.zh: 第一层面聚焦核心业务，第三层面探索颠覆性创新。

example.en: A data moat becomes more defensible as the dataset grows.
example.zh: 随着数据集的增长，数据护城河变得更具防御性。

example.en: The cheaper vendor had a higher total cost of ownership when support fees were included.
example.zh: 算上支持费用后，较便宜的供应商的总拥有成本反而更高。
